name: votyx-poll-system
description: Votyx Poll System - A real-time polling application

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd pb-server && npm install && cd ../pb-client && npm install && cd ..
scripts.start:db: cd pb-server && docker-compose up -d && echo 'Database started on port 5434'
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run start:db && npm run db:migrate
